headline: Darcy Partners Reveals 2025 Top Innovators Reshaping the Energy Industry
summary: Darcy Partners, a leading technology research and advisory firm for the energy sector, today announced its 2025 Top Innovators, 10 breakthrough technology providers across 12 critical energy verticals, selected based on real operator feedback from companies including ExxonMobil, Chevron, National Grid and Edison International.
